subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested Himself through the splendors of Beauty upon His Name, the Beloved, whereupon Paradise appeared anew [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی بانوار الجمال علی اسمه المحبوب اذا ظهر الفردوس بدعا و ما
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @infallibility; sinlessness ['ismat]
